hooks.command: if ((Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -and (Test-Path 'scripts/wiki-lock.sh')) { bash scripts/wiki-lock.sh clear-stale --max-age 3600 2>$null }; exit 0

hooks.prompt: Hook-injected context does not survive context compaction. If wiki/hot.md exists in the current directory, silently re-read it now to restore the hot cache. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: if (-not (Test-Path '.git' -PathType Container)) { exit 0 }; if (Test-Path '.vault-meta/auto-commit.disabled') { exit 0 }; if ((Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -and (Test-Path 'scripts/wiki-lock.sh')) { $lockList = bash scripts/wiki-lock.sh list; $lockRc = $LASTEXITCODE; if ($lockRc -ne 0) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force '.vault-meta' | Out-Null; ('{0} wiki-lock list failed rc={1}; deferred auto-commit' -f (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'), $lockRc) | Add-Content '.vault-meta/hook.log'; exit 0 }; if ($lockList) { exit 0 } }; git add -- wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/; git diff --cached --quiet -- wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 1) { git commit -m ('wiki: auto-commit {0}' -f (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')) -- wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/ }; exit 0

if ((Test-Path 'wiki' -PathType Container) -and (Test-Path '.git' -PathType Container)) { $changed = git diff --name-only HEAD | Where-Object { $_ -like 'wiki/*' }; if ($changed) { Write-Output 'WIKI_CHANGED: Wiki pages were modified this session. Please update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary of what changed (under 500 words). Use the hot cache format: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads. Keep it factual. Overwrite the file completely. It is a cache, not a journal.' } }
